title: Prologis Reports Third Quarter 2025 Earnings
content: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) today reported financial results for the third quarter of 2025. Core FFO was $1.42 per diluted share. The company signed 47 million square feet of new leases during the quarter, with average rent change on rollover of 32.1%. Occupancy stood at 95.8%. Management raised full-year Core FFO guidance to $5.60–$5.64 per diluted share.

title: Prologis Acquires 3.2 MSF Dallas-Fort Worth Logistics Portfolio
content: Prologis announced the acquisition of a 3.2 million square foot Class-A logistics portfolio in the Dallas-Fort Worth metro area for approximately $620 million. The portfolio consists of 8 buildings, 96% leased to investment-grade tenants. The transaction expands Prologis' DFW footprint by approximately 12% and is immediately accretive to Core FFO.

title: Prologis Reports Second Quarter 2025 Earnings
content: Prologis, Inc. reported Q2 2025 Core FFO of $1.38 per diluted share, up 6% year-over-year. The company completed $1.4 billion in development starts during the quarter and maintained overall occupancy of 96.1%. Net effective rent change on new and renewal leases was 30.4%. The company is on track with its full-year strategic development plan of $3.5–$4.0 billion.

title: Prologis Commences $145M Build-to-Suit in Illinois
content: Prologis announced the commencement of a $145 million build-to-suit development for a Fortune 100 retailer in the I-55 Corridor of Illinois. The 890,000 square foot distribution facility will feature advanced automation infrastructure, 48-foot clear heights, and 200 dock doors. Expected delivery is Q2 2026.

title: Prologis Acquires Phoenix Industrial Portfolio for $310M
content: Prologis acquired a 1.8 million square foot industrial portfolio in the greater Phoenix metro area for $310 million. The 6-property portfolio is 94% leased and benefits from Phoenix's strong population growth and near-shoring logistics demand. The acquisition aligns with Prologis' Sun Belt expansion strategy.

title: Prologis Reports First Quarter 2025 Earnings
content: Prologis reported Q1 2025 Core FFO of $1.35 per diluted share. The company started $800 million in new development projects and achieved a 97.2% retention rate. Net rent change on signings was 28.6%. Customer satisfaction scores reached an all-time high of 78 NPS points.

title: Prologis Announces $500M Solar Energy Initiative
content: Prologis announced a $500 million investment to deploy rooftop solar across 200 buildings in its US logistics portfolio over the next three years. The initiative is expected to generate 1.2 GW of clean energy capacity and reduce Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 35% by 2028. Participating customers will receive green energy credits as part of Prologis' SolarSmart program.

title: Prologis Expands Essentials Platform with EV Charging Rollout
content: Prologis announced the expansion of its Essentials platform with the installation of 10,000 EV charging stations across 300 logistics facilities nationwide. The program addresses the growing needs of fleet electrification for Prologis' customers, including major e-commerce and third-party logistics operators. Charging infrastructure will be operational at target sites by Q4 2025.

title: Prologis Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Earnings
content: Prologis reported Q4 2024 Core FFO of $1.40 per diluted share and full-year 2024 Core FFO of $5.48 per diluted share, up 9% year-over-year. Total revenue for 2024 was $8.12 billion. The company completed $3.8 billion in development starts for the year and grew its land bank by 2,200 acres in target markets.

title: Prologis Acquires 2.1 MSF Atlanta Distribution Campus
content: Prologis acquired a 2.1 million square foot multi-building distribution campus in the Hartsfield-Jackson Airport submarket of Atlanta for $385 million. The campus is 100% leased to blue-chip tenants including a major e-commerce platform and a global freight forwarder. The acquisition reinforces Prologis' position in the Southeast's premier logistics corridor.
